account_settings.description: Page title for the account settings screen

change_password.description: Button label to initiate a password change

current_password.description: Input field label for the user's existing password

new_password.description: Input field label for the desired new password

confirm_password.description: Input field label to re-enter the new password for verification

language_preference.description: Dropdown label for choosing the display language

timezone_setting.description: Dropdown label for selecting the user's time zone

email_notifications.description: Toggle label for enabling or disabling email alerts

delete_account_warning.value: Deleting your account is permanent and cannot be undone.
delete_account_warning.description: Warning message shown before account deletion

save_preferences.description: Button to save all settings on the preferences page
